data.title: LendingTree, Inc. (NASDAQ: TREE) will report Q4 2025 earnings on March 2, 2026, after market close.
data.description: On January 21, 2026, Charlotte-based LendingTree, Inc. (NASDAQ: TREE), known for LendingTree.com, the top online financial services marketplace in the U.S., revealed plans to disclose its fiscal Q4 2025 outcomes post-market hours on March 2, 2026.
Select Medical Holdings (NYSE: SEM) will announce Q4 & full year 2025 results on Feb 19, 2026 after market closes.

data.title: Paycom Software will announce Q4 and year-end 2025 earnings on Feb. 11 after the market closes. Conference call at 5 p.m. EST.
data.description: Paycom Software, Inc. will be sharing its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year ending Dec. 31, 2025, after the market closes on Feb. 11. Following this announcement, a conference call will take place at 5 p.m. (Eastern) on the same day to discuss the results. For those interested in participating, the dial-in number is +1 (833) 470-1428 for domestic callers and +1 (646) 844-6383 for international callers, with the access code being 829388. A replay of the call will also be available by dialing +1 (866) 813-9403 for domestic callers and +1 (9***** for international callers.

data.title: Karman Space & Defense will discuss Seemann and MSC acquisition and maritime expansion in investor call, updating fiscal expectations for 2025 and 2026.
data.description: Karman Space & Defense, based in Huntington Beach, California, is set to hold a conference call discussing their recent acquisitions of Seemann and MSC, as well as their plans for maritime expansion. The call will also cover updated financial expectations for the years 2025 and 2026. Stay tuned for more information on this exciting development.

data.title: MetroCity Bankshares, Inc. (NASDAQ: MCBS) declares $0.25/share quarterly cash dividend, payable on Feb. 13, 2026.
data.description: Atlanta-based MetroCity Bankshares, Inc. (NASDAQ: MCBS) revealed today that its board of directors has approved a quarterly cash dividend of $0.25 per share for its common stock. The dividend is set to be paid out on February 13, 2026 to shareholders who are recorded as of a specific date.

data.title: Live Oak Bancshares, Inc. reported Q4 2025 net income of $44.1M, or $0.95/share & $102.8M, or $2.23/share for 2025.
data.description: In a press release on January 21, 2026, Live Oak Bancshares, Inc. (NYSE: LOB) disclosed their financial results for the fourth quarter of 2025. The company reported a net income of $44.1 million attributed to common shareholders, equivalent to $0.95 per diluted share. For the entire year ending on December 31, 2025, the net income attributable to common shareholders amounted to $102.8 million, translating to $2.23 per diluted share.

data.title: Eagle Bancorp, Inc. Announces Fourth Quarter 2025 Results and Cash Dividend
data.description: In Bethesda, Maryland, on January 21, 2026, Eagle Bancorp, Inc. (NASDAQ: EGBN), the parent company of EagleBank, a prominent community bank in the Washington D.C. region, disclosed its unaudited financial outcomes for the fourth quarter concluding on December 31, 2025.

data.title: Bill Katz of Greenberg Traurig, LLP recognized in Lawdragon 500 Global Antitrust & Competition Lawyers 2026 list for 2nd year.
data.description: In Dallas on January 21, 2026, Bill Katz, the co-chair of the Antitrust Litigation & Competition Regulation Practice at Greenberg Traurig, LLP, has been honored in the 2026 Lawdragon 500 Global Antitrust & Competition Lawyers list for his outstanding contributions. This marks his second consecutive year receiving this recognition. Katz's accolade solidifies his position among the top legal professionals in the field globally.

data.title: abrdn Global Premier Properties Fund (AWP) approved 1-for-3 reverse stock split, effective Jan 21, 2026 via PRNewswire.
data.description: On January 21, 2026, the abrdn Global Premier Properties Fund (NYSE: AWP), a closed-end fund based in Philadelphia, disclosed a significant update. The Fund's Board of Trustees greenlit a 1-for-3 reverse stock split concerning its common shares. The decision, backed by both the Board of Trustees and Aberdeen, was made with the intention of boosting the value of each share. The reverse stock split is a strategic move aimed at enhancing shareholder value and overall market appeal.

data.title: Madrigal Pharma granted an equity award to new Chief Accounting Officer Rita Thakkar under its 2025 Inducement Plan.
data.description: On January 15, 2026, Madrigal Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (NASDAQ:MDGL) based in Conshohocken, PA, disclosed granting an equity award to Rita Thakkar, their recently appointed Chief Accounting Officer. The award was provided as an equity inducement award pursuant to Madrigal's 2025 Inducement Plan and was approved by the company's Board of Directors following Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4). Madrigal Pharmaceuticals is a biopharmaceutical firm concentrating on developing innovative treatments for metabolic dysfunction-associated steatohepatitis (MASH).

data.title: Oportun CEO Raul Vazquez to step down by April 3, 2026. Board starts CEO search. Preliminary Q4 & full-year 2025 results shared.
data.description: CEO and Board member Raul Vazquez will be resigning by April 3, 2026. The Board has started the search for a new CEO. They have also released the preliminary financial and operating results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025.

data.title: Axogen plans to offer $85.0 million in common stock, with an option for $12.75 million more, in a public offering.
data.description: Axogen, Inc., a leading global company specializing in innovative surgical solutions for restoring peripheral nerve function, has announced its plan to conduct a proposed underwritten public offering. The offering includes $85.0 million worth of shares of its common stock, with an additional option for the underwriters to purchase up to $12.75 million more. All shares in the offering will be sold by Axogen. The completion of the offering, as well as its final size and terms, are subject to market and other conditions and there is no assurance on its timing.
